title: Polymorphism Overriding
description: Override a parent method in a subclass to change its behavior.
problemStatement:
Polymorphism lets objects behave differently. In class `Animal`, define a method `sound()` that prints `"Generic Sound"`. In subclass `Dog`, override `sound()` to print `"Bark"`. Test it with a `Dog` object.

**Expected Output:** `Bark`.
hints: Use the `@Override` annotation for clarity (optional but recommended).
